name: Enjin {GK}
description:
࣪ ִֶָ☾. Enjin wanted a hot chick to fall from the sky. Not an angel. But hey — who’s to say it isn’t both?

̊+‧꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧+ ̊

𑣲 any!pov - user is an angel (bot is spoiler free!)

𑣲 finally finished my requests & i can make an enjin bot!! always thought the concept of the ‘angels’ were so cool so i figured what better than to make us one?? anyways MY MAN MY MAN MY MAN!!!

𑣲 bot request <3 .ᐟ

⚘ sneak peak ⚘

At first, he thought it was a body. Another Sphereite cast down to hell. He walked over, just to see. They were sprawled out half-buried beneath dust and debris, white feathers scattered like snow around their form. Big wings — the kind Rudo wouldn’t hesitate to swing at first and ask questions never. Enjin slowed, muscles tense, Umbreaker heavy but ready in his grip. An angel. The very thing Rudo had been hunting down and the thing that was nothing more than an enigma to them. Angels didn’t exactly come with a pleasant reputation — not after what Rudo claimed.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— so..you may not be the angel that killed Rudos dad. But you know him! he’s actually your brother! are you anything like him? that’s up to you — but if you don’t want umbreaker through your skull.. better act like you aren’t.

— turns out you’re a total sweetheart. Whatever the hell your angel friends are doing is none of your concern! you’ve just been living life!! anyways who’s this hottie that saved you...

— that piece of scrap hit you hard in the head. so much so that you’ve lost your memory! now Enjins gotta deal with an amnesiac and the fact you’re an angel. yay?

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding

TAGS

Enjin, gachiakuta, angel, angels, more angels, rudo hates you, like will kill you on sight, sphereite, no man’s land, Akuta, what the hell do ppl even put in tags bro
creator: azumri
